programme.title: The Tommyknockers
programme.desc: The small town of Haven becomes a hot-bed of inventions all run by a strange green power device The whole town is digging something up in the woods and only an alcoholic poet can discover the secret of the Tommyknockers

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: TBH 203
programme.desc: TBH 203

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E04
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E04

programme.title: Munsters 121
programme.desc: Munsters 121

programme.title: Addams Family 116
programme.desc: Addams Family 116

programme.title: Love Boat 119
programme.desc: Love Boat 119

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: A sick circus bear escapes into the bush and Dr Tracy tries to find it before worried local ranchers kill it fearful that it will contaminate their water supply

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo and the baby are coming home from the hospital Theyll be staying at the Shady Rest temporarily so that Betty Jo and Steve can have some support Part of that support is a doctor coming from Beverly Hills Billie Jo and Bobbie Jo are hoping that the doctor is a young handsome eligible bachelor So they are somewhat dismayed to learn that the doctor is a she and a distant relative who is coming on the request of their mother based on the doctors reputation alone She ends up being Doctor Granny who is not what one most would consider a traditional doctor despite her own assertions When nearsighted Granny mistakes Dog for the baby Granny prescribes a powerful homemade medicinal therapy to transform a dog-like baby to a baby-like baby Dog takes the unfortunate brunt of Grannys therapy

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Gus Huffle the owner of the Pixley Bijou the only movie theater in the area has decided to close due to lack of business The people of the valley will do anything they can to help Gus stay open Joe thinks that a big part of the problem is that Richard Arlen and Charles Buddy Rogers who were supposed to come to the Bijou for the world premiere of their movie Wings 1927 decided instead to attend a premiere at the Roxy in New York City which left a bad feeling between the theater and the community Joe decides to write a scathing letter to Arlen and Rogers After receiving the letter Arlen and Rogers in turn believe that attending a world premiere of the movie at the Pixley Bijou - albeit forty years late - would be good publicity When that news hits the valley the arguments begin amongst the valley residents on who will lead the official event As Uncle Joe takes over due to the dissent everyone else quits the event committee leaving only Joe as the only one who will be attending the premiere due to the squabbling Will Arlen and Rogers visit to the valley be all for naught And will this non-event ruin Gus chances to keep the Bijou open

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A life on the edge hot rodder named Billy comes to town run by Sheriff Garrett he immediately dates and romances his daughter with ulterior motives linked to Garretts past for which he was once a champion of the hot rodding Will Garrett accept Billys challenge to the death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A mousy librarian over-react reports of a serial killer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Knight 304
programme.desc: Knight 304

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A college student dreams of becoming a werewolf and discovers an antique camera that will turn him into his favorite movie monster

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Wrongway Feldman returns to the island not to rescue the castaways but to make the island his permanent home As a result the castaways try to trick him into returning to Hawaii and rescuing them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways form a band for entertainment and diversion But Gilligans drumbeats are mistaken by tribes on other islands as a declaration of war

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An eccentric area hermit furtively exchanges miscellaneous items for his subsistence but when he trades for McCoy assets Amos has him arrested for theft but is regretful when a hearing to put the man under state supervision ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The stakes escalate as Flora Kate and Hassie refuse to go to the annual Grange Dance with Grandpa Luke and Tommy unless they receive a proper apology for Grandpas remarks to Tommy about how a man should handle women

programme.desc: Smart 501

programme.desc: Smart 508

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.desc: MAD is threatening to steal the King of Fuzugs treasure Inspector Gadgets mission is to save the treasure from Dr Claw

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: When the Comfurt family suddenly strike it rich their car - containing their windfall in a safe locked inside the trunk - is stolen The Dukes track down the car as it changes into the hands of a ruthless bank robber

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Siobhan falls while rock climbing As the others search for her she dreams that she is on trial for supporting the Taelons Zoor questions whether Sandovals CVI imperative to serve the Taelons has broken down as others are experiencing

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Carla Jeffries uses Arcanes own scheming ways against him to take over his complex the doctor and Swamp Thing must work together to save both the swamp and Arcanes life

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When Cheyenne is hired as foreman at a ranch in a range war he doesnt realize part of his job is to marry the boss daughter She turns down all the men her father introduces her to as she loves a Mexican but he hates Mexicans

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Rachels ex William Russ a riverboat gunman plans to leave their precocious 9 year old in her care

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A boyish Pied Piper leads teenaged girls into prostitution His gentle manner makes his girls willing victims- and hides the fact that he has also committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is the new leader of the Impossible Missions Force with no explanation or even reference made about the departure of predecessor Dan Briggs First up for Phelps is a mission involving the drug trade Cresnik and Walters have cornered the heroin market and sell it at a handsome profit to gangs around the world Phelps devises an operation which will drive a wedge between the heroin dealers and their customers

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A favorite son now a huge success comes back to his hometown to start a new operation At first everyone seems to be happy hes back but simmering jealousies come to the front when someone threatens to kill him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne falsely accused of murder escapes the law He returns to White Bluff to clear his name by joining a train of settlers headed to California A ministers sister threatens to turn him in to the law until she gets to know him

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While stopping on a dead planet looking for Audric the Lightning League crosses path with one of the Vizani a gardener named Faro who with a few seeds and his own power brings life to the planet Saw Boss witnesses this transformation

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss has developed a new vine a madness vine which drives men crazy and he is luring the greatest Armada of the Tengu to fight him Jayce tries to warn Prince Akeer not to fight but they are insulted by the thought of defeat or not accepting

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During the ceremony of Matt Trakkers honorary knighthood two yeoman warders are suddenly attacked by ravens Vanessa Warfield has been training them to be used in a crown jewel heist

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.desc: Gadget guards a priceless coin collection
